name: Document Loader
responsibility: Convert supported files into normalized text, metadata, and extracted structured elements.
notes: Parser quirks stay inside this module.

name: LLM Adapter
responsibility: Route model calls, enforce structured output, retries, timeouts, cost limits, and provider fallback.
notes: Product code should not call OpenAI, Anthropic, or other providers directly.

name: Report Renderer
responsibility: Render validated structured data into Markdown, HTML, DOCX, PDF, or other outputs.
notes: Rendering should not own domain analysis.

name: Evaluation Harness
responsibility: Load fixtures, run scenarios, validate outputs, score rubrics, and emit eval reports.
